about.title: About Charlie's Transportation
about.content:
Charlie's Transportation is a family-owned private-pay transportation service based in Rahway, New Jersey. We are dedicated to providing safe, reliable, and comfortable transportation solutions for individuals and families in our community.

Our mission is simple: to get you where you need to go with dignity, comfort, and professionalism. We understand that transportation is more than just getting from point A to point B — it's about independence, access, and peace of mind.

With years of experience in the transportation industry, we have built a reputation for excellence, reliability, and compassionate service. Our fleet of modern vehicles is maintained to the highest standards, and our drivers are committed to your safety and comfort.
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and dignified transportation services that enhance the quality of life for our clients and their families.
values: Safety First — Every ride, every time
Reliability — We show up when we say we will
Compassion — We treat every client like family
Professionalism — Excellence in everything we do
Community — Serving our neighbors with pride

services.title: Our Transportation Services
services.description: We offer comprehensive private-pay transportation services designed to meet your needs. All services are provided by professional drivers in modern, comfortable vehicles.

services.title: Medical Appointments
services.description: Reliable transportation to and from doctor visits, hospital appointments, and medical procedures. We ensure you arrive on time and stress-free.

services.title: Social Outings
services.description: Enjoy dinner with friends, visit family, or attend community events. We provide comfortable transportation for all your social occasions.

services.title: Personal Errands
services.description: Need to go shopping, run errands, or visit the bank? Let us handle the driving while you focus on what matters.

services.title: Airport Transfers
services.description: Stress-free airport transportation with timely pickups and dropoffs. We monitor flight schedules to accommodate changes.

services.title: Wheelchair Accessible
services.description: Accessible vehicles equipped to accommodate wheelchairs and mobility devices, ensuring everyone can travel comfortably.

services.title: Event Transportation
services.description: Group transportation for weddings, parties, corporate events, and special occasions. Customized to your schedule and needs.
